reason: Reviewers/checkers need the backend verification checklist because the likely follow-up work is MCP/server heavy.
Validation must confirm that connection failures, runtime failures, and tool-level errors remain explicit and actionable.
Future checks need to verify that diagnostics improvements do not pollute MCP stdout and remain operationally useful.
Follow-up task verification should include test strategy quality, not only build success.
Checks should confirm that any fix closes the full agent workflow loop across backend, plugin, and runtime layers.
